senses.definition: a comfortable seat that has a back and two arms and enough space for two or multiple people to sit on

examples.x: I spilled some coffee on the sofa, so I quickly cleaned it up.
The leather sofa adds a touch of elegance to the room.
The sofa in the living room is big enough to seat three people.
The sofa provides a great place to take an afternoon nap.
We bought a new sofa to replace the old one.

senses.definition: a sofa that is designed in a way that when unfolded forms a bed

examples.x: The sofa bed in the guest room was perfect for when we had family over for the weekend.
She pulled out the sofa bed to accommodate her friend who needed somewhere to sleep.
The sofa bed was easy to convert, making it a convenient choice for unexpected guests.
We bought a new sofa bed that matches the living room decor, and it's very comfortable to sleep on.
After a long day, he appreciated the ease of unfolding the sofa bed for a quick nap.

senses.definition: a type of sofa or armchair with deep button tufting, rolled arms, and often made of leather
a bed that is designed to function as a seating area during the day and as a bed for sleeping at night, typically featuring a twin-sized mattress and a frame with a backrest and armrests

examples.x: The day bed in the guest room doubles as a cozy reading nook during the day and a comfortable bed at night.
She added decorative pillows to the day bed to make it look more inviting when guests came over.
After a long day, he curled up on the day bed with a blanket to watch his favorite movie.
The small apartment had a beautiful day bed by the window, perfect for afternoon naps.
We decided to place a day bed in the sunroom to create a relaxing space for lounging.

senses.definition: a type of small sofa that can be converted into a bed, usually by unfolding or lowering the backrest and armrest

examples.x: The studio couch in the apartment easily converts into a bed for guests.
The small living room is furnished with a comfortable studio couch for when visitors stay over.
After a long day, he stretched out on the studio couch and relaxed before going to bed.
The studio couch was the perfect solution for the tiny apartment, offering both a cozy place to sit and sleep.
He bought a new studio couch that was stylish and functional, ideal for his small space.

senses.definition: a long upholstered seat with a back and arms that can accommodate several people, typically designed for sitting in a living room or reception area
a long, upholstered seat for reclining, with a backrest at one end and a raised section for supporting the legs and feet

examples.x: After a long day, she enjoyed relaxing on the chaise longue by the window, reading a book.
The living room was furnished with a plush chaise longue, perfect for an afternoon nap.
He reclined on the chaise longue, enjoying the warmth of the sun streaming through the glass doors.
The hotel room featured a luxurious chaise longue near the balcony, offering a view of the ocean.
They placed a chaise longue in the corner of the room, creating a cozy reading nook.

senses.definition: a small sofa or couch designed for seating two people

examples.x: The loveseat in the corner of the living room is perfect for two people to relax together.
We bought a new loveseat to fit in the small apartment and save space.
After a long day, they sat on the loveseat and enjoyed a quiet moment together.
The new loveseat matches the modern decor in our living room.
We placed a colorful throw on the loveseat to add a pop of color to the room.

senses.definition: a small, decorative piece of furniture that has a back and arms, and is designed to seat two or three people
a type of comfortable, overstuffed sofa with square back cushions and box-shaped seat cushions

examples.x: The Lawson sofa in the living room is perfect for lounging after a long day.
We decided to buy a Lawson sofa because of its deep seat and comfortable cushions.
The clean lines of the Lawson sofa complement the minimalist design of the room.
I love how the loose cushions on the Lawson sofa make it so cozy and inviting.
The room looks much more relaxed and stylish with the addition of the new Lawson sofa.

senses.definition: a traditional sofa with a high backrest that curves outward in the middle to create a hump, and usually has exposed wooden legs and rolled arms

examples.x: The antique camelback sofa added a touch of elegance to the living room.
The camelback sofa's curved back gave the room a refined, sophisticated look.
She chose a camelback sofa for its classic design and timeless appeal.
She found the camelback sofa to be both stylish and practical, perfect for her living room.
He relaxed on the camelback sofa, enjoying the comfort it provided after a long day.

senses.definition: a classic style of sofa featuring rounded, padded arms that are lower than the backrest and a deep, plush seat

examples.x: The club sofa in the living room was perfect for relaxing after a long day.
We decided to buy a club sofa for the den because of its cozy, inviting design.
He sunk into the deep cushions of the club sofa, enjoying the warmth of the fire.
The new club sofa in the office lounge was a hit with everyone during lunch breaks.
The dark brown club sofa complemented the traditional decor of the room.

senses.definition: a type of sofa that has arms that are the same height as its back, with clean lines and a tailored look

examples.x: The living room was transformed with a luxurious tuxedo sofa, offering a sleek and modern focal point.
She chose a velvet tuxedo sofa to add elegance and sophistication to her newly renovated apartment.
The tuxedo sofa's clean lines and bold design made it the perfect piece for the contemporary lounge.
We found a vintage tuxedo sofa at the antique store, which added character to the otherwise minimalist space.
The designer recommended a tuxedo sofa for its timeless appeal and versatile style in the modern office.

senses.definition: a traditional style of sofa that features low arms and a higher back with comfortable and loose seat cushions

examples.x: I love how the Bridgewater sofa invites you to sink in and relax after a long day.
The soft cushions on the Bridgewater sofa made it the perfect spot for an afternoon nap.
We chose a neutral color for our Bridgewater sofa to complement the rest of the decor in the room.
The low, rolled arms of the Bridgewater sofa give it a relaxed, classic look.

senses.definition: a sofa with a backrest that can be tilted backward for a more comfortable seating position

examples.x: After a long day at work, she sank into the reclining sofa and stretched out her legs.
The reclining sofa in the living room is perfect for watching movies on lazy Sundays.
He adjusted the backrest of the reclining sofa to find the most comfortable position.
The reclining sofa has built-in cup holders, making it ideal for home theater setups.
The reclining sofa made it easy for him to take a nap after a busy afternoon.

senses.definition: a type of sofa that consists of multiple individual pieces that can be rearranged in various configurations to suit different needs and preferences

examples.x: The modular sofa is perfect for our growing family since we can add more sections as needed.
I love how the modular sofa can be transformed into a cozy corner or a large seating area depending on the room layout.
We decided to buy a modular sofa because it allows us to adjust the seating for different activities, like entertaining or relaxing.
When hosting guests, I can easily rearrange the modular sofa to create extra seating for everyone.

senses.definition: a type of traditional sofa that is characterized by a continuous curved back and arms that are the same height as the back

examples.x: She sat on the cabriole sofa, admiring the intricate wooden carvings on its arms.
The living room was filled with antique furniture, including a stunning cabriole sofa with elegant curved legs.
The designer chose a rich velvet fabric to upholster the cabriole sofa, enhancing its classic charm.
The cabriole sofa’s graceful curves added a touch of sophistication to the otherwise simple room.

senses.definition: a modern style sofa featuring a straight and square armrest, usually upholstered in leather or fabric

examples.x: The track arm sofa in the living room adds a sleek, modern touch to the space.
I decided to go with a track arm sofa because I love its minimalist design.
The track arm sofa was the perfect choice for the contemporary apartment.
She preferred the simplicity of a track arm sofa over more traditional, bulky designs.

senses.definition: a type of sofa characterized by its adjustable arms, deep seats, and high back, often featuring decorative tassels or ties at the corners of the arms

examples.x: The Knole sofa in the living room was the perfect blend of tradition and luxury.
She chose a Knole sofa for her drawing room because of its timeless design and comfort.
He admired the craftsmanship of the Knole sofa, noting its high back and distinctive ties.
The antique Knole sofa, with its adjustable arms, added a touch of elegance to the space.
The interior designer suggested a Knole sofa for its classic look, perfect for a formal setting.

senses.definition: a type of sofa with a rounded, barrel-shaped backrest and arms that are lower than the backrest

examples.x: She relaxed on the barrel back sofa, enjoying the smooth, curved design that perfectly fit the space.
The living room was enhanced by the addition of a classic barrel back sofa, which added both style and comfort.
The cozy barrel back sofa was the perfect spot for reading or having a quiet conversation.
In the corner of the room, a vintage barrel back sofa complemented the modern decor with its timeless shape.
The new barrel back sofa fit perfectly into the small space, offering a unique blend of comfort and design.

senses.definition: a type of sofa that features an extended backrest that rises above the height of the arms and creates a tall profile for added comfort and support
a type of sofa that features a low backrest, typically below the height of the armrests

examples.x: The low-back sofa in the living room gives the space a more modern, open feel.
I prefer a low-back sofa because it makes the room feel less crowded.
She chose a low-back sofa for the office, creating a casual and comfortable environment.
A low-back sofa can make small spaces look larger and more airy.
The designer suggested a low-back sofa to match the minimalist decor of the room.

senses.definition: a type of sofa that features tufting, which is a decorative technique where the fabric is pulled and folded over padding to create a tufted or buttoned pattern

examples.x: The tufted sofa in the living room added a touch of vintage charm to the space.
I love the feel of the soft, tufted sofa after a long day at work.
She chose a tufted sofa in a rich velvet fabric for the family room.
He sat down on the tufted sofa, enjoying its plush cushions and timeless design.

senses.definition: a type of seating furniture that consists of separate sections or pieces that can be arranged in various configurations to fit a particular space or need
a type of sofa made up of multiple sections that can be arranged in a curved shape, often used as a centerpiece in a living room or entertainment area

examples.x: The family chose a curved sectional sofa to create a cozy gathering space in their living room.
A curved sectional sofa fits perfectly in the corner, making the most of the room's layout.
Guests comfortably gathered around the coffee table, seated on the spacious curved sectional sofa.
A curved sectional sofa was the ideal choice for the large bay window in their home.
The decorator suggested a curved sectional sofa to make the seating area feel more inviting.

senses.definition: a low couch-like seat, typically without a back or arms, often used as a daybed or for additional seating in a living room
a piece of furniture that has a soft and comfortable area for two or more people to sit or rest on

examples.x: After a long day, I like to relax on the couch with a good book.
The family gathered on the couch to watch their favorite movie.
The living room was adorned with a plush couch for guests to enjoy.
I found a cozy spot on the couch to catch up on my favorite TV shows.
The couple spent a lazy Sunday afternoon cuddled up on the couch.

senses.definition: a type of upholstered seating that features a backrest and armrests, and can be converted into a bed by unfolding or lowering the backrest
a type of two-person sofa or loveseat, with two seats facing each other and a shared armrest in the center
